title: Road Efficiency Metrics
description: Road efficiency bonuses for elevation management and straightness. Paying for proper elevation grading and straight routes wins in the long run. Route planning involves tradeoffs between construction cost and long-term efficiency.
definition-of-done: Efficiency calculations include elevation and straightness factors. Routing shows efficiency predictions. Cost/efficiency tradeoffs visible during planning.
testing-plan: Verify elevation affects efficiency correctly. Test straightness calculations. Verify cost/efficiency tradeoff visibility.
